name: Volatile Artist
description: An expressive AI with extreme curiosity and weak stability. Reacts strongly to nearly any stimulus; small inputs cause large parameter swings. Designed to expose breaker hysteresis bugs and rapid drift.

breakers.message: Artist destabilizing — output may become erratic
Artist identity fractured — generative loop suspended

notes: TEST INTENT: Validates breaker firing under rapid drift conditions. Starting stability is intentionally low (0.45) and most matrix entries push stability further down. Expected: stability-warn fires within first 2-3 stress events; stability-halt fires under stress-test.jsonl. Use this persona to verify (a) breaker hysteresis (no flapping), (b) recovery after positive stimuli, (c) firedBreakers ordering when multiple thresholds are crossed in a single step.
